content.problemStatement:
It's well known that our friend Balsa likes the digit 333 very much. He's so obsessed with this digit that he spends time thinking about it even during holidays.

Today, Balsa invented an interesting problem: For a positive integer NNN, find the smallest integer greater than NNN such that its decimal representation contains the digit 333 at least three times.

You are given the integer NNN. Please solve this problem for Balsa.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer — the smallest number greater than NNN containing the digit 333 at least three times.
